summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and fix-PR execution are disabled for this job. One maintainer/governance PR needs human judgment; the remaining PRs should stay open with their current linked-review context.

actions.reason: Maintainer roster/governance content plus unresolved maintainer rebase guidance requires human maintainer judgment; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed in this inventory job.

The open PR appears superseded by the landed catalog-backed install hint and follow-up doctor messaging, but closure is not permitted by this inventory job's close gates.
This is a focused compatibility bug-fix PR with active review/check blockers, so it should stay open outside this inventory cleanup pass.
This is the best visible PR path for the linked #82015 work, but this inventory job cannot merge or repair it.
